name: CPI Core Inflation
description: Core inflation strips food and fuel out of the CPI basket, leaving a steadier read on underlying price pressure. The RBI watches this closely because food and fuel swings are often temporary, while core moves tend to reflect genuine demand.
source: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI)
releaseSchedule: Derived monthly from the same CPI release, around the 12th.

chart.title: Core inflation has stayed unusually calm
chart.subtitle: CPI core (ex food & fuel), year-on-year % change, monthly
